name: Anemone Bouquet
description: 12 premium anemones with seasonal greenery. These delicate blooms feature papery petals in rich jewel tones — perfect for brightening any room. Each stem is hand-selected for peak freshness and arranged by our master florists. Comes wrapped in kraft paper with a satin ribbon.

reviewList.author: Sarah M.
reviewList.text: Absolutely stunning bouquet! The colors were even more vibrant than the photos. Lasted over 10 days.

reviewList.author: James K.
reviewList.text: Beautiful arrangement, great value for the price. Delivery was prompt and the flowers were well-protected.

reviewList.author: Priya R.
reviewList.text: Ordered for my mother's birthday and she was thrilled. Will definitely order again.

name: Sunflower Dreams
description: Bright sunflowers with seasonal greenery. These cheerful sunflowers are grown on our sustainable farm using organic practices. Each stem reaches 4-5 feet tall with heads up to 8 inches across. Arranged with eucalyptus and waxflower for a rustic farmhouse feel.

reviewList.author: Emma L.
reviewList.text: These sunflowers made my whole kitchen brighter! They opened up beautifully over the first few days.

reviewList.author: David O.
reviewList.text: Biggest, happiest sunflowers I've ever seen. The vase life was impressive too.

reviewList.author: Amara S.
reviewList.text: Lovely quality. A few petals dropped during delivery but otherwise perfect.

name: Premium Orchids
description: Exotic phalaenopsis orchids in a sleek ceramic pot. Our premium orchids are grown in climate-controlled greenhouses to ensure perfect blooms. Each plant features 3-4 flower spikes with multiple buds. The glossy ceramic pot in matte white complements any interior style.

reviewList.author: Nadia K.
reviewList.text: Gorgeous orchid! The blooms are still going strong after 3 weeks. The pot is beautiful too.

reviewList.author: Rosa M.
reviewList.text: Beautiful plant, arrived in perfect condition. Slightly smaller than expected but still lovely.

reviewList.author: Chen W.
reviewList.text: Second time buying from here. Always exceptional quality. The packaging is very thoughtful.

name: Wedding Arrangement
description: Premium wedding arrangement for ceremonies and receptions. This luxurious centerpiece features garden roses, hydrangeas, peonies, and trailing jasmine. Designed by award-winning wedding florists, each arrangement is custom-crafted to match your color palette and theme.

reviewList.author: Lauren T.
reviewList.text: Our wedding flowers were absolutely perfect. Everyone complimented them all night. Thank you!

reviewList.author: Michael P.
reviewList.text: Exceeded our expectations. The attention to detail was incredible. Worth every penny.

reviewList.author: Sophia L.
reviewList.text: The most beautiful wedding flowers I've ever seen. They matched our theme perfectly.

name: Classic Red Roses
description: Fresh cut red roses direct from the farm. A dozen premium long-stem red roses, hand-cut at peak bloom. Our roses are grown in nutrient-rich soil and shipped within 24 hours of cutting. Each stem is carefully wrapped with protective petals and includes flower food for maximum vase life.

reviewList.author: James B.
reviewList.text: My wife loved them! The roses were huge and smelled incredible. Lasted 8 days.

reviewList.author: Maria G.
reviewList.text: Best roses I've ever ordered online. They arrived fresh and opened beautifully.

reviewList.author: Kwame A.
reviewList.text: Great quality. A couple of stems were slightly bent but the blooms were perfect.

reviewList.author: Lisa C.
reviewList.text: Ordered for our anniversary. Absolutely stunning. Will be my go-to from now on.

name: Spring Tulips
description: Vibrant assortment of spring tulips in pink, yellow, and white. These Dutch-grown tulips are imported fresh and arranged in a cheerful mixed bouquet. Each stem is at the perfect stage — closed enough to travel safely but ready to open and dance in your vase.

reviewList.author: Emma L.
reviewList.text: Lovely tulips. They kept growing in the vase which was fun to watch. Great value.

reviewList.author: Daniel R.
reviewList.text: Perfect spring bouquet. The colors are so cheerful and they lasted a full week.

name: Succulent Collection
description: Hand-picked succulent trio for your home or office. This curated collection features three complementary succulent varieties planted in a modern geometric planter with drainage. Includes echeveria, jade, and aloe — each chosen for their unique texture, color, and easy-care nature.

reviewList.author: Priya N.
reviewList.text: Perfect little succulents! They look great on my desk and are so easy to care for.

reviewList.author: Tom H.
reviewList.text: Nice arrangement. The planter is smaller than expected but the succulents are healthy.

reviewList.author: Akua N.
reviewList.text: Bought as a gift and my friend loved them. Great packaging and healthy plants.

name: Lavender Bunch
description: Dried lavender bunches, fragrant and long-lasting. Our lavender is grown in the highlands of Ghana, hand-harvested at peak bloom, and naturally air-dried to preserve its intense fragrance and vibrant purple color. Each bunch contains approximately 50 stems tied with jute twine.

reviewList.author: Nadia K.
reviewList.text: Smells amazing! The lavender is so fragrant and looks beautiful in my bedroom.

reviewList.author: Yaw B.
reviewList.text: Good quality dried lavender. The scent is strong and long-lasting. Great for DIY projects.
